title: Navbar
description: Top-level application/header navigation container. Prefer semantic <header> + <nav>.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

keyboard: All nav items must be reachable with Tab.
Provide a skip link to main content (recommended).
aria: Use <nav aria-label="Primary"> for the primary navigation region.
Indicate current page with aria-current="page" on the active link.

must: Navigation must be usable with keyboard only.
Current page must be indicated (aria-current + visual).
should: Include a skip link to main content at the top of the page.
Keep primary nav items limited; use overflow menu for long lists.
must_not: Do not hide focus outlines in the header.

token_usage.notes: Default header background in light/dark themes.

examples.title: Semantic HTML reference
